title: Woven Basket, Storage Baskets, Small Woven Storage Basket with Handle, Gift Basket Empty, Cotton Rope Baskets for Gifts Toy Fruit Towel Easter Egg, Stylish Living Room Bedroom Nursery Home Decor
features: 【Soft Material】This storage basket is crafted from high quality white cotton rope, measures 13.0''×5.9''×3.9in, making it a durable and gentle cotton rope basket. It’s soft to the touch, and won’t scratch furniture, ideal for daily use

【Oval Shape & Versatile Use】The oval design fits narrow spaces, like bathroom counters or beside sofas, working as a functional bathroom basket for toilet paper or towels, or a cozy box to keep pet storage basket. Its neutral white color blends with any decor style

【Stylish Woven Look】With a tight, neat weave, it doubles as a decorative woven basket that adds a warm, minimalist vibe to any room. Use it as a centerpiece on shelves, a bedside organizer, or a entryway bin for keys, turning clutter into a stylish display

【Spacious Storage】It offers ample space for small items like toiletries, socks, and can even work as a compact blanket basket for throw blankets in living rooms. The lightweight build makes it easy to move between rooms

【Ideal White Decor】As a versatile white basket, it brightens up dark corners and complements boho, modern, or Scandinavian decor. Whether for personal use or gifting, it balances function and aesthetics, making it a must-have for anyone seeking organized, stylish spaces
